category_title: Preschoolers with expressive language difficulties who use adults as living auxiliary tools
scenario_title: Seeking attention for experience sharing amidst distractions
minimal_context: Maliha is trying to share her experience about seeing a theatre show with her educator during outdoor free play.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We are outside for free play. You can tell me your story while I get on this tricycle.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Jumping in joy) This is so much fun … my sister … a dad die. (Bends body to play the role of 'die')

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: I see. Wait here, I need to help another child tie his shoelace.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Patting on Amanda's hand) Awa awa awa... Son of lioking …pay ticket. (Claps hands)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Hold on, another child is coming to complain. I am going to ride the tricycle now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Keeps following Amanda, touches her, and stops Amanda's tricycle by widening her hands) Awa awa awa!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We are outside for free play. You can tell me your story while I get on this tricycle.

STUDENT: (Jumping in joy) This is so much fun … my sister … a dad die. (Bends body to play the role of 'die')

TUTOR: I see. Wait here, I need to help another child tie his shoelace.

STUDENT: (Patting on Amanda's hand) Awa awa awa... Son of lioking …pay ticket. (Claps hands)

TUTOR: Hold on, another child is coming to complain. I am going to ride the tricycle now.

STUDENT: (Keeps following Amanda, touches her, and stops Amanda's tricycle by widening her hands) Awa awa awa!

task.content: excitedly sharing her experience of seeing the 'Lion King' theatre show, using physical movements to act out parts of the story

context.social_setting: educator (Amanda) on a tricycle, other children complaining/needing help

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Amanda was distracted from the conversation as she was gradually being involved in ensuring no ﬁghting, discussion with other educators and, ﬁnally, riding on a tricycle
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: patting on Amanda's hand, said 'Awa awa awa', touched Amanda, stopping Amanda's tricycle by widening her hands
related_quotes: This is so much fun … my sister … a dad die

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: kept following Amanda, waiting until Amanda ﬁnished a task, trying to touch, pat in order to seek her attention
